---
title: "Ask"
page-layout: full
css:
  - ask-chat.css
  - ask-graph.css
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="vendor-marked.min.js"></script>
      <script src="vendor-d3.min.js"></script>
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script src="ask-graph.js"></script>
      <script src="ask-chat.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="chat-container">
    <div class="chat-panel">
        <div id="messages" class="messages"></div>
        <form id="chat-form">
            <div class="chat-input-row">
                <select id="mode-toggle" class="mode-toggle" title="Retrieval mode">
                    <option value="agentic">Agentic</option>
                    <option value="rag">RAG</option>
                </select>
                <input type="text" id="user-input"
                       placeholder="Ask about genes, papers, cancer types..."
                       autocomplete="off" autofocus>
                <button type="submit" id="send-btn">Send</button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>

    <button class="drawer-toggle btn btn-sm"
            type="button"
            data-bs-toggle="offcanvas"
            data-bs-target="#side-drawer"
            aria-controls="side-drawer">
        Context <span class="drawer-toggle-badge" id="drawer-badge"></span>
    </button>

    <div class="offcanvas offcanvas-bottom glass-panel"
         tabindex="-1"
         id="side-drawer"
         aria-labelledby="side-drawer-label">
        <div class="drawer-handle"></div>
        <div class="drawer-tabs" role="tablist">
            <button class="drawer-tab active"
                    role="tab"
                    aria-selected="true"
                    data-drawer-pane="context-pane">
                Context <span class="context-total" id="context-total"></span>
                <span class="drawer-tab-info"
                      data-info-for="context-pane"
                      role="button"
                      tabindex="0"
                      aria-label="About the Context tab"
                      aria-expanded="false">ⓘ</span>
            </button>
            <button class="drawer-tab"
                    role="tab"
                    aria-selected="false"
                    data-drawer-pane="graph-pane">
                Graph <span class="graph-visited-count" id="graph-visited-count"></span>
                <span class="drawer-tab-info"
                      data-info-for="graph-pane"
                      role="button"
                      tabindex="0"
                      aria-label="About the Graph tab"
                      aria-expanded="false">ⓘ</span>
            </button>
            <button class="drawer-maximize"
                    type="button"
                    id="drawer-maximize"
                    aria-label="Expand drawer">
                <i class="bi bi-arrows-angle-expand"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class="drawer-panes">
            <div class="drawer-pane active" id="context-pane">
                <div class="drawer-info-panel" id="context-info" hidden>
                    <p>Everything the AI model sees on each turn — your message, its responses, and every tool call it makes. Click any card to expand the raw contents. Older tool results are automatically pruned to keep the model's attention budget lean.</p>
                </div>
                <div id="context-feed" class="context-feed">
                    <p class="empty-state">As you ask a question, the context the model sees will build up here block-by-block.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="drawer-pane" id="graph-pane">
                <div class="drawer-info-panel" id="graph-info" hidden>
                    <p>A map of the wiki. Index on the left, section folders in the middle, every page as a leaf on the right. Hover a leaf to see its cross-links to other pages, and click any node to open that page.</p>
                    <p><strong>Agentic mode:</strong> nodes light up as the AI navigates the wiki, tracing the path it follows from Index → section → page on each turn.</p>
                    <p><strong>RAG mode:</strong> all papers whose chunks were retrieved by the vector search light up at once, showing the retrieval footprint for your query.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="graph-toolbar">
                    <button type="button" class="graph-btn" id="graph-fit-btn">Fit</button>
                    <button type="button" class="graph-btn" id="graph-reset-btn">Reset visits</button>
                    <span class="graph-legend">
                        <span class="graph-legend-dot graph-legend-visited"></span> visited
                        <span class="graph-legend-dot graph-legend-current"></span> current turn
                    </span>
                </div>
                <div id="graph-canvas" class="graph-canvas">
                    <p class="empty-state">Loading wiki graph…</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```
